title: A few questions about Adam
wikitext:
[]: A few questions about Adam             Quote Post by 1rate » Tue Aug 31, 2021 10:39 pm I have a few questions. When Kaji gives Adam's embryo to Gendo the latter tells him that Adam is "the first human", why? What does that mean? Isn't Adam supposed to be the first Angel? In episode 22, Misato tells Gendo that maybe it's not a good idea for the Eva to have contact with Adam (which is actually Lilith but whatever) in terminal's dogma since that might cause a third impact. Who told her that and why? When did she get that info? But more importantly: Adam's presence in terminal dogma was clearly supposed to be a secret, so why does she mention Adam without a care in the world? Did Nerv relay the info to it's employees? Why? When did that happen? What am I missing? Lastly, I'm not really sure what can cause a third impact (maybe there's multiple ways to cause it and they lead to different outcomes), however I'm pretty sure that one way to do it has something to do with fusing Adam and Rei which is what Gendo does in EoE, but if that's the case, why doesn't he just stick his hand into Rei right after he got Adam's embryo implanted? Maybe all the angels needed to be defeated for whatever reason but even then why didn't he just talk to Rei and do the hand thing immediately after Kaworu gets killed?

[]: Re: A few questions about Adam             Quote Post by Archer » Wed Sep 01, 2021 7:52 am I do believe the angels being defeated was seen as a prerequisite for 3I. Other than that, I feel like the answer to a lot of those other questions is “don’t think about it too hard”, though I’d be interested to hear if they ACTUALLY have consistent explanations with actual textual evidence.

[]: Re: A few questions about Adam             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Sun Sep 05, 2021 5:36 pm @Archer : The answer to a question in the discussion forum is never "don't think about it too hard" - to suggest so is spitting on the very purpose of this subforum and on the discussion rules that you are supposed to have read by visiting this forum. If you don't have a constructive answer here, don't give one . Simple. 1rate wrote: When Kaji gives Adam's embryo to Gendo the latter tells him that Adam is "the first human", why? What does that mean? Isn't Adam supposed to be the first Angel?

[]: Re: A few questions about Adam             Quote Post by 1rate » Sat Sep 18, 2021 3:07 pm In episode 22, Misato tells Gendo that maybe it's not a good idea for the Eva to have contact with Adam (which is actually Lilith but whatever) in terminal's dogma since that might cause a third impact. Who told her that and why? Watch the ending of Episode 15 again, and you'll have the answer to this question
